copy.reason: Pure Node retrieval/index engine; private eval set replaced by demo QA before release.
MCP wrapper, smoke test, shared mcp-client, and loop integration test; docs paths must be genericized before release.
Local document ingestion CLI (PDF/DOCX/XLSX/Markdown/text -> KB notes). Synthetic fixtures only; default module genericized to 'general' and grounding mode to 'generic'.
Optional static UI viewer over the engine. The public preview at gke.dimouzunov.com ships sanitized demo content only; private workspaces, generated content, dist, and node_modules stay excluded.
Synthetic and license-checked OSS demo content only (paraphrased MCP docs concepts + synthetic project board).
